tags.name: word-tag
tags.description:
Attributes:

  * `hrefUrl` {`string`} - 

  * `word` {string} - The tagged word

  * `heaviness` {WordTagHeaviness} - The weight of the tag (text & border), can be
`"normal"` (`--md-ref-typeface-weight-regular` & `--hairline-width`) or
`"heavy"` (`--md-ref-typeface-weight-bold` & `2.5 * --hairline-width`)

Properties:

  * `styles` {`any[]`} - 

  * `hrefUrl` {`string`} - 

  * `word` {string} - The tagged word

  * `heaviness` {WordTagHeaviness} - The weight of the tag (text & border), can be
`"normal"` (`--md-ref-typeface-weight-regular` & `--hairline-width`) or
`"heavy"` (`--md-ref-typeface-weight-bold` & `2.5 * --hairline-width`)

  * `object Object],[object Object],[object Object],[object Object` -
